case_title: PATEL, N. R. vs. STEWART, ALEX BERNARD et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #105 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-03-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES IF DEFT VACATES BY 10/3/93 AT 5:00 P.M. IF NOT, PLTF. WILL HAVE A JUDGMENT FOR BACK RENT OF $260.00 AND DAILY DAMAGES OF $8.67 FROM 8/16/93 TO 10/3/93 AND COST OF $80.00. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF TENANCY. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-14-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD

N.R. PATEL ARNOLD W. EVJE II, ESQ. VS. ALEX BERNARD IN PRO PER STEWART, ET. AL. 2:45 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. JUDGE PRO TEM, MORGAN PRICKETT. JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER. PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST ALEX B. STEWART FOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 74 STREET #105 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. LEASE FORFEITED. WRIT NOW, STAY EXECUTION ON WRIT TO 10/3/93 AT 5:00 P.M. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY SAID DATE, WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED. PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAMAGES IF DEFT. VACATES. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE, PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR BACK RENT OF $260.00 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $8.67 PER DAY FROM 8/16/93 TO 10/3/93 WITH COST OF $80.00. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CAUSES OF ACTION ARISING THROUGH TENANCY. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISE AFTER 10/3/93 IS DEEMED ABANDONED. NO OTHER ADULT CLAIMS A RIGHT TO POSSESS THE PREMISE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $8.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, ALEX BERNARD
